name: Gemini Live Voice Channel
description: Real-time voice conversation via Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Live. Runs a WebSocket server for direct audio connections and a Twilio Media Streams adapter for phone call integration. Audio transcoded between mulaw/8kHz (Twilio) and PCM16/16kHz (Gemini) in real-time.

geminiApiKey.description: Google AI Studio API key (reads from GEMINI_API_KEY env var)

voicePort.description: Local port for the voice WebSocket server (default: 3001)

twilioPort.description: Port for Twilio TwiML webhook + Media Streams WS (default: 3002)

twilioPublicUrl.description: Public URL for Twilio to reach this server (e.g. https://yourdomain.ngrok.io). Reads from TWILIO_PUBLIC_URL env var.

allowedPhoneNumbers.description: Phone numbers allowed to connect (e.g. ['+15551234567']). Empty = any.
